name: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Learn the fundamentals of JavaScript including variables, data types, functions, arrays, objects, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, and modern ES6 features. This course includes hands-on exercises and mini projects to help you build interactive web applications from scratch.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Introduction to JavaScript
2. Variables and Data Types
3. Operators
4. Conditional Statements
5. Loops
6. Functions
7. Arrays
8. Objects
9. DOM Manipulation
10. Events
11. Asynchronous JavaScript
12. ES6 Features

name: Node.js Backend Development
description: Build scalable backend applications using Node.js and Express.js. Learn RESTful APIs, middleware, authentication, PostgreSQL integration, error handling, file uploads, and deployment strategies through practical backend projects.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Introduction to Node.js
2. Node Modules
3. NPM
4. Express.js Basics
5. Routing
6. Middleware
7. REST API Development
8. PostgreSQL Integration
9. Authentication
10. File Upload
11. Error Handling
12. Deployment

name: React Frontend Development
description: Master React by learning components, hooks, routing, state management, API integration, reusable UI design, and responsive layouts. Build modern single-page applications that follow current industry best practices.
material:
Course Materials:

1. React Introduction
2. JSX
3. Components
4. Props
5. State
6. Hooks
7. React Router
8. API Integration
9. Forms
10. Context API
11. Performance Optimization
12. Deployment

name: Introduction to Machine Learning
description: Understand the foundations of Machine Learning including supervised learning, unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, and real-world AI applications using Python and Scikit-Learn.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Introduction to Machine Learning
2. Python for ML
3. Data Preprocessing
4. Feature Engineering
5. Supervised Learning
6. Unsupervised Learning
7. Model Evaluation
8. Scikit-Learn
9. Model Tuning
10. Mini Project

name: Deep Learning with TensorFlow
description: Explore Deep Learning using TensorFlow by building neural networks, convolutional neural networks, image classifiers, and transfer learning models. Learn optimization techniques and model deployment.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Deep Learning Basics
2. TensorFlow Installation
3. Neural Networks
4. Activation Functions
5. Backpropagation
6. Convolutional Neural Networks
7. Transfer Learning
8. Model Optimization
9. Image Classification
10. Model Deployment

name: Natural Language Processing
description: Learn Natural Language Processing from basic text preprocessing to sentiment analysis, word embeddings, transformers, and chatbot development using modern NLP frameworks and practical datasets.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Introduction to NLP
2. Text Preprocessing
3. Tokenization
4. Vectorization
5. Sentiment Analysis
6. Word Embeddings
7. Transformers
8. Chatbot Development
9. Model Evaluation
10. Deployment

name: Ethical Hacking Basics
description: Understand the fundamentals of ethical hacking including reconnaissance, vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, exploitation basics, and reporting. Learn how attackers think and how to defend against common threats.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Cybersecurity Fundamentals
2. Reconnaissance
3. Scanning
4. Enumeration
5. Vulnerability Assessment
6. Exploitation Basics
7. Password Security
8. Web Security
9. Reporting
10. Best Practices

name: Web Application Security
description: Protect modern web applications from SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF), authentication vulnerabilities, and insecure configurations following OWASP Top 10 guidelines.
material:
Course Materials:

1. OWASP Top 10
2. SQL Injection
3. Cross-Site Scripting
4. CSRF
5. Authentication Security
6. Session Security
7. Input Validation
8. Security Headers
9. Penetration Testing
10. Deployment Security

name: Cisco Networking Essentials
description: Build a strong networking foundation by learning IP addressing, subnetting, routing, switching, VLAN configuration, network troubleshooting, and Cisco device configuration through guided lab exercises.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Networking Fundamentals
2. OSI Model
3. TCP/IP
4. IP Addressing
5. Subnetting
6. Switching
7. Routing
8. VLAN
9. Cisco CLI
10. Network Troubleshooting

name: Network Infrastructure Management
description: Learn how to design, monitor, maintain, and secure enterprise network infrastructures. Topics include network monitoring, redundancy, disaster recovery, infrastructure optimization, and network security best practices.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Network Fundamentals
2. Infrastructure Design
3. IP Planning
4. Switch Management
5. Router Configuration
6. Network Monitoring
7. Redundancy
8. Disaster Recovery
9. Network Security
10. Infrastructure Optimization
11., Performance Tuning
12. Final Project

name: Big Data Analytics
description: Analyze massive datasets using Hadoop, Spark, ETL pipelines, data warehousing, business intelligence, and visualization techniques to support data-driven business decision making.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Big Data Overview
2. Hadoop
3. Spark Basics
4. ETL Pipelines
5. Data Warehousing
6. Business Intelligence
7. Data Visualization
8. Batch Processing
9. Streaming Data
10. Case Study

name: Apache Spark for Data Processing
description: Master Apache Spark by learning distributed computing, Spark SQL, DataFrames, RDDs, performance optimization, and scalable data processing pipelines through real-world case studies.
material:
Course Materials:

1. Apache Spark Overview
2. RDD
3. DataFrames
4. Spark SQL
5. Transformations
6. Actions
7. Performance Optimization
8. Spark ML
9. Structured Streaming
10. Cluster Deployment
